title: philotheca gardneri
intro: Philotheca gardneri, also known as Westringia fruticosa, is a shrub native to Australia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The leaves and flowers of Philotheca gardneri have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, offering benefits like reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immunity. Herbal preparations of Philotheca gardneri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to create topical creams and salves for skin care and wound healing.
